title: orthocarpus pachystachyus
intro: Orthocarpus pachystachyus, also known as the Woodland Monkey Flower, is a perennial plant species native to the western United States and Canada. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic compounds. The health benefits of Orthocarpus pachystachyus include its ability to soothe respiratory issues and alleviate symptoms of colds and flu. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, allowing for various forms of consumption to harness its medicinal properties.
